item.description:
greetings online friends
still got it
mmm hmm
gets everywhere
that’s a new one
not really either tbh
exactly what I pictured
hedgie
dang
remarkable
obviously
well shit
us guys see this and think "hell yeah"
as is tradition
i feel this in my soul
um, yeah
i got nothin'
that's my set.. have a great night gang!! happy mothers day to the moms of imgur!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I mean... its a bit Weird...
item.description: EDIT: Hey there, thanks for the upvotes everyone! Remember, being weird from time to time can be good! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, feel free to visit https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: I got an apartment! Living on my own terms for the first time in 7 years!
item.description:
It's not much, but it's mine! I can wake up when I want, I can go to bed when I want. I can eat whatever I want whenever I want. I can say what I want; I can sing what I want.
Biggest downside is this tight tiny kitchen. I LOVE to cook. But now that I'm living alone I'll take a bit of a break from that to explore other creative outlets. Cooking for 1 (who am I kidding? I am 2) is not easy and not usually worth the work/clean up
OMG a bedroom all of my own??? I can fit a big ole comfy bed in here!
bathroom's nothing fancy, but it serves its purpose and is not horrifying (horrifying bathrooms were a common thread in my apartment search....don't know why more landlords don't realize it's an immediate "no thanks"). will definitely be upgrading the shower head asap.
literally everything I owned on my move in date fits in this closet. and the only thing I've bought since then is food and a queen bed.
other side of the closet; love the shelves for a makeshift linen closet
this is what sold me on the property... < 20 min walk to the beach. I went today for the first time; it took me about 25 mins, but I was taking it super easy (recuperating from surgery) and in flip flops.
looking forward to many morning walks on the beach
something's always got to go wrong....the kitchen sink doesn't drain worth a damn. I'll be submitting a maintenance request first thing tomorrow. (it's not ruining my day, and I don't want to ruin anyone elses's Sunday)
Kitchen set up so far. It hasn't been as difficult to work with as I expected.
here is my faaaaannnnncccccy bed (by fancy I mean "not a twin bed", can you even imagine??!!!). I saved a LOT by purchasing the floor model, also. And their credit check must be weak af because they gave me 0% financing for a year. I'm no longer sleeping in a child's bed; I've slept in worse; beggars can't be choosers. p.s. - stay tuned for the story of Fluffy (the yellow *stuffed animal* in this pic). I have been meaning to make a post about Fluffy for quite some time. She's my ride or die for like 38 fucking years (that cannot possibly be right....FUCK ME THAT'S RIGHT)
Don't judge me - I moved in a rush and am also very lazy and procrastinate a lot. Just illustrating further that almost everything I own fits in this closet. It's insane.
the bare necessities (sing it!). crosswords help me poop
this is my current wfh set up (which is at least as good, if not better, than it has been for the last 4 years). hopefully improving in the next 6 months. Edit: You guys are AMAZING!! Thank you so much for all the love, support, and tips! I am so excited, and it makes me so happy that you all are so happy for me! Love this community so much! I was originally going to post a whole long story about the last few years of my life, but I feel like it doesn't even matter now. Looking ahead with positivity!
item.dc:creator: butnoelephants

1
2
3
4
5
6

Cat tax I posted a similar one last year and forgot about it. I just found it now and thought it's funny for Mother's Day so I edited and resubmitted this again. Happy Mother's day and enjoy it! FP edit: Thanks guys and thanks for the accolade!

item.title: Memes vol 284
item.description:
It’s a special edition! Memes I’ve sent my mother! Starting off with a monchichi because she’s a child of the 80s!
She did this to me when I was a baby
She loves goats
We had an in-depth conversation about this book when she recently reread it and was questioning her school
She’ll make peanut butter pickle sandwiches
SEE?!
These will never fail to make me crack up
Scruffy tax
Liza Jane and Froggy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: I just want to make sure that everything is okay with them.
item.dc:creator: MrMrsCrowley

item.title: I thought I was good.
item.description: Went feral after getting hammered, called a bunch of people, showed up a couple places. Finally got some coke and literally blew through 40 bucks in 2 lines. I did the right thing and texted my people after I woke up and realized what happened. So much support. And I think there won't be a next time allowed. They care too much.
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: So this is love
item.description: My best friend. I don't know what I would do without him. Especially on days like today when it's Mother's Day and I'm sad and missing my mom so much. I hope this doesn't break the no selfies except on Christmas rule. Edit: Didn't expect to make the front page. Donate to an animal rescue if you can and want to. Chase is a rescue that was previously found as a stray.
item.dc:creator: MonstreBelle

item.title: I wish it wasn't like this
item.description: Posting this into the oblivion... I hope all the mothers out there really did have a good day with thier children. Say a little prayer for the ones that don't have that chance. This day can be rough. I also send love to the ones who don't have thier mother with them now.
item.dc:creator: ILike2TouchButts

item.title: Drove 8 hours to wish my mom a happy mother’s day. Not only did she remember me but I was able to get her to smile and laugh. Sometimes it’s the little things.
item.dc:creator: Debberz

item.title: Havasupai Falls, Arizona. First time backpacking. Epic, bucket list shit
item.description:
Mooney Falls
Yay! We made it
On the way down to Mooney Falls
Between Mooney Falls and Beaver Falls
Beautiful ivy
Ladder
NOT 5 minutes away...
Climbing down the ladder at Mooney Falls was just the beginning hahaha
More ladders. Doesn't look the least bit sketchy although it was secure
Feel the burn
Beaver Falls. Absolutely beautiful
FINALLY! Next to Beaver falls.
Beaver falls
Still beaver falls
Going back the way we came
So beautiful
Heading back up at Mooney Falls to get back to the campground. Sisnt get any pictures going down
Havasu Falls
Warning labels lol
Little tidbit of information
50 foot falls.
item.dc:creator: jackieblahblahblah

item.title: Monday Music Meme Dump
item.description:
This is just a sample
Some music memes for Monday
I can hear this in my head
What even are words?
Live your best life
Beats on in the aftelife
Vibe check
Stairway
What?
Oh yeah
Right back to it
We got the blues up in here
WXPN on in the background
Who knew?
What are you listening to?
Cash wants to know. He’s serious, don’t let him down. #dogtax

item.title: Here's some bottom shelf memes, Mom.
item.description:
OddOnesOut because some fuck cropped out his signature
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the meme challenges!
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Taxi Bear and Mr. Nutterbutt tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

pls no

http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii (It is always correct to scream at Clint).
Yiheus!
(Dances)
Having to stay away from Eurovision did hurt tbh. It really is gay Christmas.
Gay Nerd.
They're right.
A creature!
I keep my deformed twin in mine :)
HELL YEAH!
@Hox1067 I hope you're still high.
if you replace the word "Woke" with "Degenerate" you start seeing newspaper headlines for what they are actually trying to say.
Oh no
Well this is a thing.
This is why you should lie on the internet about yourself.
owo
Yippee!
I need to do this with Eric.
This is a good view on life to be honest, live to spite God.
In my Stardew game, Harvey is a Catboy!
This implies Scooby Doo hated JFK.
Pee when you see your friends. it's only far.
Yeah this is what I say when people say "hurr durr we don't need human rights law cuz magna carta", it protected the rights of Barons and Lords, not everyone.
I used to fit in a suitcase
ALERT!
D:
Batnipples
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For chaotic Stardew Valley Shenanigans: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: A Free Meal Day. 296 Days of free food since 2018.
item.description: Thank you @altersepp for sponsoring a meal day. Basically, you sponsored a meal for 3 zones. This is the first one. The rest will be uploaded shortly. Its is almost May and the end of the school year here in the Philippines. If you all remember, I have been handing out school supplies every class reopening. For your reference, https://imgur.com/gallery/v5fcS25 sadly this post didnt reach the FP My plan is to start a campaign for the school supplies drive to happen so I want to start as early as possible. For the school supplies, the goal is to be able to raise at least 1000$. If this goal is reached within May, Its important to buy the supplies immediately as the prices go up by June when the class is almost open. For School Supplies and Meal sponsorship, please refer to paypal ojcallope17@gmail.com. Please include which category you want me to use your money. If you prefer Wire transfer or Crypto, you may. Just let me know. You can also be patron at patreon.com/TheFreeMeaLadyImgurian to support us long term. Salamat po.
item.dc:creator: TheFreeMeaLLady
